raw_consumer_statement: We flew XXXX XXXX from XXXX XXXX  to XXXX but that flight was delayed and we missed the flight from XXXX to XXXX. We had to stay in XXXX overnight for XXXX hours and then to catch the XXXX XXXX  to XXXX. From XXXX we then went to XXXX. We barely got any sleep and then when we arrived in XXXX the next day, they even lost our luggage. When they found the luggage they delivered it to our home in XXXX. This caused us a lot of hardship and we were requesting XXXX of our airfare off. We paid {$340.00} per person for XXXX people so we are requesting XXXX which is {$170.00} X XXXX for {$510.00} refunded for our troubles. Citi bank is not helping us resolve this issue
